untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) calculation of price spread between two ETFs (GLD and unlisted counterpart) — spread construction not supported; (2) dynamic daily hedge ratio computation via linear regression over 20-day lookback — custom regression calculation not in allowed indicators; (3) comparison of spread deviation from mean using rolling mean calculation — rolling mean indicator not in allowed list; (4) mean reversion threshold determination — marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no fallback value provided. The strategy is fundamentally dependent on pair/spread analysis and custom statistical calculations beyond the scope of single-instrument technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is a pairs trading / statistical arbitrage strategy that requires: constructing a synthetic spread variable (price ratio or difference between two securities), computing a time-series mean and rolling deviations, performing linear regression for hedge ratio calculation, and identifying mean reversion opportunities via spread z-scores or similar. None of these capabilities exist in the allowed indicator set, which covers only single-instrument price-based and oscillator metrics. To implement this signal, the backtest engine would need to support: (a) dual-instrument data loading and spread calculation, (b) rolling statistics (mean, std dev), (c) linear regression output, and (d) regime detection for mean-reverting vs trending behavior.
